name: Aman Gupta
title: AI/ML & Deep Learning Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Competitive Programmer
bio: I'm an AI/ML engineering student at IIT Mandi passionate about building scalable systems and intelligent applications. My expertise spans Generative AI, Deep Learning, MLOps, and full-stack development with Flutter and Next.js. I thrive on solving real-world problems through hackathons, agentic AI systems, and end-to-end ML pipelines. Enthusiastic about research, open-source, and pushing the boundaries of practical AI.
pors: Organised KrackHack (48 HR hackathon, 800+ participants) as a member of GDG IIT Mandi
Problem setter at FCC (Fresher Coding Contest 2026) — Programming Club IIT Mandi
Web developer at Student Gymkhana IIT Mandi — Science & Technical Council (SNTC)

achievements.title: iHub Multimodality Hackathon Winner
achievements.subtitle: National level hackathon by iHub IIT Mandi

achievements.title: FrostHack 2025 Winner
